nodes.text: Oh — you scanned it? Is there something wrong with the prescription? Because the urgent care gave it to me like two hours ago, it should be fine.

responses.text: The prescription looks fine. I need your date of birth.

nodes.text: Oh, okay. Good. Sorry, I'm just — this is only the second time I've filled a prescription on my own. I know that's kind of embarrassing at twenty-three but my mom always handled the insurance stuff.

responses.text: It's not embarrassing. Can you confirm your date of birth?
You're doing fine. Everything looks good here.

nodes.text: November second, two thousand and one. I'm twenty-three. I keep waiting for it to feel like an adult age.
Thank you. Sorry for all the questions earlier. Occupational hazard of being anxious.
